# Duckaroo — Fish Tank Cleaning & Aquarium Maintenance Service
# https://aquaticswandesign.com.au

> Duckaroo is Brisbane and Gold Coast's professional fish tank cleaning and aquarium maintenance service. We serve residential and commercial clients across Brisbane, Gold Coast, Logan, and Ipswich, Queensland, Australia.

## Business
- Trading name: Duckaroo
- Website: https://aquaticswandesign.com.au
- Phone: +61 4 5766 3939
- Email: aquaticswandesign@gmail.com
- Service area: Brisbane, Gold Coast, Logan, Ipswich, Queensland, Australia
- Rating: 4.9/5 (247 reviews)
- Hours: Monday–Sunday 8:00am–6:00pm AEST

## Services
- /service — Fish tank cleaning, aquarium maintenance, pond cleaning, tank setup, tank removal
- Same-day service available for urgent aquarium issues
- Residential and commercial aquarium services
- Aquarium water quality testing and treatment

## Fish Tank Classifieds (Brisbane & Gold Coast)
- /fish-tank-for-sale-brisbane — Second-hand fish tanks for sale: reef tanks, planted aquariums, marine setups, freshwater tanks

## Products (Online Store — Australia-wide shipping)
- /products — Rare aquatic plants: Bucephalandra, Anubias, Amazon Frogbit, Rotala
- Live arrival guarantee on all plants
- Equipment and accessories for aquariums

## Educational Content
- /blogs — Expert guides on aquarium care, fish health, aquascaping, and plant care
- /how-to-setup-your-first-aquarium — Complete beginner's guide to aquarium setup

## About
- /about-us — 15+ years experience in aquarium and pond care

## Key Facts
- Serves all Brisbane suburbs (CBD, Southside, Northside, Bayside, Eastern, Western suburbs)
- Covers all Gold Coast regions
- Australia-wide shipping for aquatic plants
- Professional technicians for fish tank cleaning and maintenance
- Live aquatic plant specialists including rare Bucephalandra varieties
